positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial forest grove at twilight. The main subject is a grouping of bioluminescent, stylized trees with glowing canopies, intermingling with delicate, swirling astral flora. The scene features elegant, sweeping lines and deep contrasts, suggesting deep space meeting nature. Use a limited, vibrant color palette of indigo, electric teal, deep violet, and luminescent gold. The composition must be perfectly centered, featuring strong silhouettes against a glowing nebula background. Art style: detailed vector illustration meets sacred geometry and Art Nouveau. Ideal for screen printing on clothing. Cinematic lighting, high contrast, clean lines.
